response.overview: A young student runs through the streets, trying to catch a bus that would lead to a university entrance exam. The bus seems to be gone. In that moment, a simple assumption grows into something overwhelming. A chain of thoughts begins, suggesting that missing the bus might also mean missing an entire future.  As reality blends with imagined outcomes, the focus shifts. Instead of loss, attention turns to what has already been achieved ,small but meaningful moments that shape identity.  In the end, reality breaks through: the bus is still there. The moment was never truly lost.
response.tagline: What if one small moment could change everything?
response.title: Névjegyfilm
